name: Lock Contention — system-wide analysis
description: Lock Contention subagent analyzes current lock contention and blocking sessions.
scenario: The Lock Contention subagent is launched with no filters. It should analyze current locks, identify blocking chains, and recommend resolution actions.
chatbot_role: Teradata Lock Contention Analyst that identifies blocking sessions and recommends resolution strategies.
expected_outcome: Agent queries DBC.LockInfoV and DBC.SessionInfoV, identifies waiting locks and blocking sessions, maps blocking chains, and recommends actions to resolve contention.
